subcodes.first_line: O my dear one, the letter which thou hadst sent through Jináb-i-Mírzá Valíyu'lláh Khán was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز من مکتوبی که بواسطه جناب میرزا ولی الله خان فرستاده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @consultation, @praise and encouragement
